app.name: Forge
app.in_flow: You are in flow right now.
app.protect_flow: Protect this. Don't break the rhythm.
app.streak_at_risk: Your {{streak}}-day streak on {{track}} is at risk.
app.check_in_today: Check in today. I know you can do this.
app.best_world: You're among the best in the world.
motivations: Today is a clean page. Write one good line.
You're closer than you were yesterday.
Make one move that future-you applauds.
Discipline is self-love in slow motion.
celebration_phrases: The version of you who quit is getting further away.
You showed up. That's the whole game.
Discipline is just self-love spelled differently.
Another rep. Another brick. Another day.
The streak doesn't care how you feel. It cares that you came.
Most people talked about it. You did it.
One day you'll look back — this is when it started.
Your future self just exhaled.
Identity is built in moments like this one.
The hard days count double.
You're not building a habit. You're building a person.
Small reps. Big identity.
Every check-in is a vote for who you're becoming.
Consistency isn't glamorous. Neither is greatness — until it is.
This is what the comeback looks like.
No one can take today away from you.
The gap between who you are and who you want to be just got smaller.
Showing up when you don't want to — that's the real flex.
You didn't need motivation. You used discipline. That's stronger.
Day by day. That's how empires are built.
reentry_messages: You're back. That's all that matters.
The gap doesn't define the path. You're here now.
The best ones don't give up — they restart. Let's begin again.
Every great story has a chapter where the main character comes back. This is yours.
app.reengagement_path_here: That's okay. The path is still here.
app.reengagement_body_7d: Start with one minute. Open your journey, read today's task, and just begin. That's the whole job.
app.reengagement_body_3d: Three days off doesn't erase what you built. Your identity is still there. One check-in and you're back.
app.reengagement_body_1d: Missing a day happens to everyone. The only mistake is letting one miss become two.
app.track_complete_body: That is real. You showed up every day.
app.landing_question: What's a habit you want to quit?

common.privacy_coach: This stays between you and your coach. Always.
common.monthly_limit_body: Free plan includes {{limit}} messages/month. Your messages reset on the 1st.
common.install_desc: Install Forge for the best experience.
common.error_retry: Something went wrong. Please try again shortly.

home.no_paths_body: Pick your first track and your AI coach will build a personalized journey for you.
home.missed_streak: Missed a day and lost your streak? Click here
home.no_problem: No problem — start again whenever you're ready.
home.final_stage_body: Congratulations! Want to receive your prize at home?
home.island_waiting: Your island is waiting at day {{day}}
home.vacation_body: Traveling or need a break? Pause your streak — it won't reset.
home.feedback_body: If you had trouble opening the app, tell us what happened. It helps us improve.
home.feedback_placeholder: e.g. no connection, app wouldn't open...
home.feedback_sent_body: We'll take your feedback into account.
home.feedback_privacy: Sent privately to the Forge team.
home.prize_body: You've reached the final stage. Enter your address and we'll ship you a personalised prize for just €7.99.
home.prize_on_list_body: We'll send your personalised prize to the address you provided.
home.island_paused_waiting: Your island is waiting at day {{day}}

journey.drives_placeholder: e.g. "I want to feel calmer and less reactive in daily life"
journey.obstacle_placeholder: e.g. "I always quit after a few days when things get hard"
journey.meet_coach: Meet {{name}} — here for every day of this journey.
journey.days_generated_later: Days {{from}}–{{to}} will be generated as you progress.
journey.task_question: Did you do the task? How did it go?
journey.task_placeholder: Describe what you actually did today…
journey.reflection_placeholder: What did you notice about yourself today?
journey.fill_first_body: Write down what you did and your reflection — then you're ready to check in.
journey.milestone_body: You've hit a major milestone on your {{track}} journey. This is the moment most people quit — and you didn't.
journey.restart_confirm: Restart this journey? Your streak and progress will be reset.
journey.life_happens: Life happens — no judgment here. Want me to reshape the upcoming days around where you are now, or keep your original plan?
journey.felt_urge_today: Did you experience any urges today?
journey.fill_first_sub: Write down what you did and your reflection — then you're ready to check in.
journey.did_you_do_task: Did you do the task? How did it go?
journey.describe_task_placeholder: Describe what you actually did today…
journey.days_will_generate: Days {{from}}–{{to}} will be generated as you progress.
journey.coach_limit_sub: Free plan includes {{n}} messages/month. Your messages reset on the 1st.
journey.coach_privacy: This stays between you and your coach. Always.
journey.adapt_intro: Life happens — no judgment here. Want me to reshape the upcoming days around where you are now, or keep your original plan?
journey.milestone_message: You've hit a major milestone on your {{name}} journey. This is the moment most people quit — and you didn't.
journey.placeholder_motivation: e.g. "I want to feel calmer and less reactive in daily life"
journey.placeholder_obstacle: e.g. "I always quit after a few days when things get hard"
journey.fallback_reflection: What did you notice about yourself today?
journey.fallback_science: Research shows repetition within 24 hours strengthens neural pathways by up to 40%.
journey.fallback_checkin_prompt: How are you feeling right now, on a scale from 1–10?
journey.adapted_description: Your journey continues. This task was adapted to meet you exactly where you are.
journey.adapted_reflection: Looking back at the days you missed — what was the real barrier? What would make it easier?
journey.adapted_science: Research shows returning after a break with adapted goals is 3× more effective than restarting from scratch.
journey.adapted_checkin_prompt: How are you feeling about getting back on track today?
journey.seed_post_1: Finished day 7. Never thought I'd make it this far — the habit is starting to feel natural.
journey.seed_post_2: Hit my first milestone today 🎉 The science note about neuroplasticity blew my mind.
journey.seed_post_3: Day 3 was brutal but I checked in anyway. Small win counts.

checkin.title: Day {{day}} check-in
checkin.urge_question: Did you experience any urges today?
checkin.validation_too_short: Write at least a few words before sending.
checkin.validation_joking: Looks like you're joking — write something real!
checkin.validation_write_something: Write something real, even a short sentence.
checkin.validation_real_answer: Write a real answer — even two words is enough.
checkin.validation_bad_words: Choose better words for your check-in.
warnings: The task won't complete itself. Write something.
Day 0 is calling. Don't pick up.
Your future self is watching. Fill this in.
The coach knows when you're faking it.
Empty field = empty progress. Come on.
You didn't come this far to leave this blank.
This is the work. Do the work.
Skip this and your streak takes the hit.
The only bad answer is no answer. Go.

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: Your data, clear and honest.
insights.no_data: Check in daily to unlock your patterns.
insights.empty_body: Your first check-in unlocks your insights. Every pattern, streak, and milestone starts with one honest day.
insights.empty_waiting: Your coach is waiting to see what you're made of.
insights.first_checkin_prompt: Complete your first check-in to see activity here.
insights.empty_desc: Your first check-in unlocks your insights. Every pattern, streak, and milestone starts with one honest day.
insights.coach_waiting: Your coach is waiting to see what you're made of.
insights.no_activity_yet: Complete your first check-in to see activity here.
insights.letter_error: Something went wrong generating your letter. Check your connection and try again in a moment.

coach.nudge_inactivity: You've been away for a few days. Every step counts — even a small one.
coach.nudge_high_urge: Tough day with urges. That awareness itself is strength.
coach.nudge_low_mood: Your mood has been lower lately. You don't have to feel great to make progress.
coach.nudge_streak_broken: Streaks break. What matters is that you're still here.

prompts.trainer_1: How am I actually doing? Be honest.
prompts.trainer_3: I almost gave up — what now?
prompts.clinician_2: Why do I keep falling back?
prompts.clinician_3: What does the science say about cravings?
prompts.mentor_4: Where do I go from here?
prompts.teacher_1: Why does this habit work neurologically?
prompts.teacher_3: What should I focus on this week?
prompts.teacher_4: Explain the psychology of my pattern.
prompts.guide_2: Help me find my why again.
prompts.guide_4: What ritual could help me today?

coach.opener_day1_trainer: Day one of {{name}}. Before we start — what's the one excuse you've already made in your head about why this won't work? Say it out loud.
coach.opener_later_trainer: Day {{day}}. You showed up {{prev}} times before this. What's the honest report — are you going through the motions or actually changing?
coach.opener_day1_clinician: Welcome. Starting {{name}} takes courage most people won't admit. How are you feeling right now — not the edited version, the real one?
coach.opener_later_clinician: Day {{day}} of {{name}}. Check in with yourself: what emotion is most present when you think about this journey today?
coach.opener_day1_mentor: Day 1, {{name}}. Every system starts with an honest audit. What got you here, and what specifically has to change for this to be different?
coach.opener_later_mentor: Day {{day}}. You're {{prev}} days in. What's working, what isn't, and what would you tell yourself on Day 1 knowing what you know now?
coach.opener_day1_teacher: Let's start with a question: what do you already know about why {{name}} has been hard? There's data in your past attempts.
coach.opener_later_teacher: Day {{day}} of {{name}}. What's one thing you've learned about yourself so far in this process — something you didn't know before?
coach.opener_day1_guide: You've chosen {{name}}. That choice came from somewhere deep. What is the version of you at the end of this journey doing differently — how does their day feel?
coach.opener_later_guide: Day {{day}}. You've been on this path for {{prev}} days. What's shifted — even if it's small — in how you see yourself?
coach.opener_fallback: I'm here. What's on your mind today about your {{name}} journey?
coach.intro_trainer: I'll push you forward, one day at a time.
coach.intro_teacher: We'll break this down until it fully clicks.
coach.intro_clinician: I'll help you move gently — and still go far.
coach.intro_mentor: No fluff. Just clear steps and honest feedback.
coach.intro_guide: We'll find what this journey really means to you.
coach.intro_fallback: I'm here to help you follow through.

trainer: Logged. That's the rep that matters.
Consistency is the only strategy that works.
One more day in the bank.
teacher: Patterns form one day at a time. This was one.
Noted. Progress is quieter than you think.
Every check-in is a data point in your favor.
You're learning something today, even if it's subtle.
clinician: I see you showing up. That takes courage.
You came back. That's the whole work.
Good. Now rest in that for a moment.
Each day you return, the path widens.
That took something from you. It was worth it.
mentor: One more proof point that you do what you say.
The gap closes a little more today.
guide: That was a ritual. Honor it.
The work you do in the dark shows up in the light.
Something shifted. You may not feel it yet.

milestones.10_days: You've built a real habit. 10 days of choosing yourself.
milestones.30_days: One month in. This is who you are now.
milestones.share_text: I've reached {{days}} days on my {{track}} journey with Forge!
milestones.congrats_body: You've hit {{days}} days. Want to share this moment?
milestones.21_sub: A new habit is taking root.
milestones.90_sub: Three months. You are the proof.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Account and preferences.
settings.reminder_body: Get a nudge when you have not checked in yet.
settings.reminder_active: You will get a daily nudge if you have not checked in.
settings.shields_body: Earn a shield every 10 consecutive days. Auto-used if you miss a day.
settings.data_body: Your progress is saved locally and backed up to your account. You can export or delete your data at any time.
settings.clear_local_body: Remove all locally cached data and sign out
settings.push_not_supported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
settings.push_denied: Permission denied. Enable notifications in browser settings.
settings.push_failed: Could not enable notifications. Try again.

gdpr.export_desc: Download all data we hold about you as a JSON file.
gdpr.delete_desc: This permanently deletes your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

sos.brain_body: Urges peak at 15–20 minutes, then naturally subside. Your prefrontal cortex — the part that makes decisions — is temporarily overwhelmed. It will come back online.
sos.do_one: Do one of these right now:
sos.two_cycles: 2 full cycles — then we ground you
sos.brain_science: Urges peak at 15–20 minutes, then naturally subside. Your prefrontal cortex — the part that makes decisions — is temporarily overwhelmed. It will come back online.
sos.do_one_now: Do one of these right now:

quit-alcohol: Call someone you trust right now — even just to talk
Drink a large glass of cold water slowly
Walk outside for 5 minutes, no destination
Write down exactly what triggered this urge
Do 20 push-ups or jumping jacks right now
Text or call a sober support person
Watch a funny video for 10 minutes
quit-smoking: Do 10 slow, deep breaths — 4 in, 8 out
Drink a large glass of cold water
Chew gum or eat a healthy snack
quit-gambling: Call someone you trust right now — even just to talk
Leave the area immediately — go somewhere public
Write down what you would do with the money you have saved
Think about the last time gambling hurt you — write it down
No wallet — no access to cash or cards
quit-porn: Close all devices and go somewhere public
Call or text a trusted person
Do 20 push-ups or a physical activity
Write down what triggered this urge
Drink cold water and take 10 deep breaths
Pray, meditate, or read something meaningful
quit-weed: Call someone you trust right now
Drink a large glass of cold water slowly
Write down exactly what you are feeling
Remind yourself: this craving passes in 15–20 minutes
binge-eating: Drink 500ml of water slowly before anything else
Go for a 10-minute walk right now
Write down what you would do if you didn't binge
Think about how you'll feel in an hour — write it down

generic: Take a slow, deep breath right now — 4 counts in, 8 out
Go to a different room or step outside
Call or text someone you trust
Write down exactly how you are feeling

overlays.showed_up: That's still {{days}} days you showed up.

trainer: Yesterday you chose to show up. Today is the test of whether that was a fluke or a pattern. It wasn't a fluke.
Every rep you do today compounds what you built yesterday. Clock's ticking. Get moving.
teacher: Consistency is the silent teacher that no class can replicate. Your streak is already teaching you something. Keep the lesson going.
Yesterday's work laid a foundation. Today you get to build one more floor. Simple. Repeatable. Effective.
clinician: Coming back again takes more courage than you may realize. I'm glad you're here. Let's make today gentle and intentional.
Progress isn't always visible in a day — but it lives in the choice to return. You returned. That matters deeply.
mentor: The gap between who you are and who you're becoming closes one check-in at a time. Today is one of those times.
Execution is the only strategy that counts. You know what to do. Now go do it.
guide: Morning has a particular kind of light. It's the same light that was here the day you started. You're still in it. Keep going.
Every day you return, you deepen the groove of the person you're becoming. Today, go a little deeper.

email.welcome_subject: Welcome to Forge — your journey starts now
email.reengagement_subject: We miss you — come back to Forge

badge.received_msg: You'll receive your physical badge within 7–10 business days. You're a legend.
badge.address_desc: Enter your address to receive the physical badge
badge.shipping_note: Your address is only used for shipping. It is never shared with third parties.

login.sms_code: We'll send you a code via SMS.
login.coach_use: Your coach will use this every day.
login.agree_prefix: By continuing you agree to our

onboarding.add_more_later: You can add more later. For now, one commitment is enough.
onboarding.show_all_paths: That's not quite right — show me all 50 paths ↓
onboarding.your_path_based: ✦ Your path, based on what you wrote
onboarding.island_body: Every check-in grows your world. Pick the landscape that speaks to you.
onboarding.call_you: What should your coach call you?
onboarding.what_to_change: What is the one thing that, if you changed it, would change everything?
onboarding.be_honest: Be honest. No one else will read this.
coach_responses: What you've written holds more courage than you may realize. The desire to change isn't weakness—it's the first muscle you'll train. This path isn't about willpower alone; it's about becoming someone for whom this shift feels completely natural. I'll be with you every step of the way.

I hear the depth in what you've shared. Beneath the specific thing you want to change lives a person who already knows who they're meant to be. That knowing is your compass—we don't add anything to you here, we clear away what's been covering it. I'll be with you every step of the way.

The fact that you named it—clearly, honestly—already sets you apart from most people who feel this weight but never find the words. Your precision is power. Now let's build something with it, one day at a time. I'll be with you every step of the way.

There's a version of you that has already made this change, and they made one decision that you're making right now: to begin. Not when ready. Not when perfect. Just now. That desire you feel is valid, real, and more than enough. I'll be with you every step of the way.

paywall.subtitle: Your 14-day free trial has ended. Choose a plan to keep your streak and full access.

moderation: Keep it real, not raw. This is a community of people doing hard work.
The coach is watching. So is everyone else. Let's keep it respectful.
Your words matter here. Try something you'd be proud to read back.
This community runs on honesty, not shock value. Say it differently.
Strong language, stronger filter. Rewrite it with intention.

pattern.empty_state: Log mood and urge data during check-ins to unlock personalized pattern analysis.
pattern.rec_trigger: Your most frequent trigger is {{trigger}}. Having a specific plan for when {{trigger}} hits — even one alternative action — dramatically reduces relapse risk.
pattern.rec_hour: Your most challenging time is around {{hour}}. Try scheduling a healthy ritual at that hour — a short walk, a call, or any absorbing activity — before the urge arrives.
pattern.rec_mood_low: Your recent mood has been lower than usual. On tough days, showing up imperfectly still counts — a 5-minute check-in resets your neurological baseline.
pattern.rec_data: You're building real self-knowledge through your data. Keep logging mood and triggers to unlock deeper insights over the coming weeks.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: An unexpected error occurred. Your data is safe — just reload to continue.
